name: IRC_PROSPECTS
description: This table stores all prospects related to a Requisition.

columns.Name: PROSPECT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. Populated by global sequence.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores whether the record is active or soft deleted. Used in soft delete functionality

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PersonId of the candidate who is added as a prospect.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the Requisition against which this prospect is created. Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: PROSPECT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of the prospect i.e Match or Referral etc.

columns.Name: PROSPECT_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the prospect i.e active or not interested etc.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Submission created against this prospect. Foreign key to IRC_SUBMISSIONS table.

columns.Name: REFERRAL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Referral from which the prospect was created. Foreign key to IRC_REFERRALS table.

columns.Name: ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PersonId who added this prospect. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the context from where this prospect was added i.e Requsition or Candidate Pool or Candidate Search

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the reference object from where this Prospect was added i.e REQUISITION_ID or CANDIDATE_POOL_ID. Will be null incase of Candidate Search.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
